name: project_scanner
description: Scan a project directory to produce a comprehensive structural overview: directory tree, file counts by type, detected languages and frameworks, entry points, configuration files, and dependency manifests. Essential for quickly understanding an unfamiliar codebase.

path.description: Root path of the project to scan. Defaults to the current working directory.

max_depth.description: Maximum directory depth to traverse. Defaults to 5.

include_file_sizes.description: Whether to include file sizes in the output. Defaults to true.

detect_frameworks.description: Whether to detect languages and frameworks from file contents and manifests. Defaults to true.

exclude_dirs.description: Directory names to exclude from scanning. Defaults to ['.git', 'node_modules', '__pycache__', '.venv', 'dist', 'build'].

output_format.description: Output format: 'tree' for directory tree, 'json' for structured data, 'summary' for a brief text overview.
